sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24086" key="deciosta/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεξιο-στάτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n24086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who stands in the right file of</tr_> the Chorus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.161</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.106</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
